debug_info.goal:
K : Type u
inst✝² : Field K
inst✝¹ : NumberField K
inst✝ : DecidableEq K
E : EllipticCurve K
P Q : MordellWeilGroup E
x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂ s : K
W : WeierstrassCurve K := ↑E
x₃ : K := s ^ 2 + W.a₁ * s - W.a₂ - x₁ - x₂
y₃ : K := s * (x₁ - x₃) - y₁ - W.a₁ * x₃ - W.a₃
⊢ let W := ↑E;
  y₃ ^ 2 + W.a₁ * x₃ * y₃ + W.a₃ * y₃ = x₃ ^ 3 + W.a₂ * x₃ ^ 2 + W.a₄ * x₃ + W.a₆

            have h₂ : y₂^2 + W.a₁*x₂*y₂ + W.a₃*y₂ = x₂^3 + W.a₂*x₂^2 + W.a₄*x₂ + W.a₆ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            have hs : s = (3*x₁^2 + 2*W.a₂*x₁ + W.a₄ - W.a₁*y₁) / (2*y₁ + W.a₁*x₁ + W.a₃) := by
              simp_all [MordellWeilGroup.slope]
            rw [hs] at *
            field_simp [h₁, h₂]
            ring_nf)

            have h₂ : y₂^2 + W.a₁*x₂*y₂ + W.a₃*y₂ = x₂^3 + W.a₂*x₂^2 + W.a₄*x₂ + W.a₆ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            have hs : s = (3*x₁^2 + 2*W.a₂*x₁ + W.a₄ - W.a₁*y₁) / (2*y₁ + W.a₁*x₁ + W.a₃) := by
              simp_all [MordellWeilGroup.slope]
            rw [hs] at x₃ y₃ ⊢
            field_simp [h₁, h₂]
            ring_nf
          )
